# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 173. Intermunicipal Commuter Rail Districts
##### § 173.354 — Applicability of Tax Code

Chapter 321 (Municipal Sales and Use Tax Act) , Tax Code, governs the computation, administration, governance, and use of the tax except as inconsistent with this chapter.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*
